sentences.sentence: Particularly in times of economic downturn, efficiency is of supreme importance across all industry bases; whilst companies may be looking to cut their costs, many still invest in staff motivation, training and development programmes, having developed an understanding of just how crucial strong internal relationships can be for success.
sentences.translation: 尤其在经济低迷时期，效率对各行各业都至关重要；虽然企业可能正设法削减成本，许多企业仍会投资于员工激励、培训和发展项目，因为它们已经认识到稳固的内部关系对成功何等关键。

structure.text: Particularly in times of economic downturn
of supreme importance across all industry bases
whilst companies may be looking to cut their costs
still invest in staff motivation, training and development programmes
having developed an understanding of just how crucial strong internal relationships can be for success

difficult_points: 分号连接效率重要性与企业培训投资两个相关分句；whilst 引导让步背景。
many 代替 many companies；having developed... 是完成式分词状语，说明企业仍投资的认知原因。
how crucial... 是感叹式名词从句，作 of 后 understanding 的内容。

sentences.sentence: Louise Edwards of HR Success says that one of the barriers she comes across time and time again is that corporate heads often seem to understand that 'team building' is important but are not quite sure what it is or how to achieve it.
sentences.translation: HR Success 的路易丝·爱德华兹说，她反复遇到的一项障碍是：企业负责人往往似乎明白“团队建设”很重要，却不太确定它究竟是什么或如何实现。

structure.text: that one of the barriers she comes across time and time again is that corporate heads often seem to understand that 'team building' is important but are not quite sure what it is or how to achieve it
she comes across time and time again
that corporate heads often seem to understand that 'team building' is important but are not quite sure what it is or how to achieve it

difficult_points: 外层 that 从句作 says 的宾语；barriers 后省略关系词 that，she comes across... 修饰 barriers。
第二个 that 从句作 is 的表语，说明障碍内容；corporate heads 是其中主语。
what it is 与 how to achieve it 是并列间接疑问内容，it 都指 team building。

expressions.text: come across time and time again

sentences.sentence: In the terms of a sports club, she says, the team (i.e. what it is and how it is defined) is obvious and easy to identify.
sentences.translation: 她说，就体育俱乐部而言，团队是什么、如何界定都很明确，也很容易识别。

structure.text: In the terms of a sports club
i.e. what it is and how it is defined

difficult_points: she says 是插入报道语；括号中的两个间接疑问说明“团队”的含义和界定。
easy to identify 中不定式与主语构成被动含义，即团队容易被识别。
源文 In the terms of 常规更常写作 in terms of，解析保留原文。

sentences.sentence: In contrast, she says, within a company – particularly a multi-layered, larger organisation, definitions may become more confused.
sentences.translation: 相比之下，她说，在企业内部——尤其是层级较多的大型组织中——团队的定义可能变得更加模糊。
difficult_points: she says 为插入语；破折号后特别指出大型多层级组织这一情境。
may become more confused 表示团队定义可能变得更混乱或不明确。

sentences.sentence: Many define a business 'team' as the group of people who report to the same boss – a department, for example.
sentences.translation: 许多人把企业“团队”定义为向同一位上司汇报的一群人，例如一个部门。

structure.text: who report to the same boss

difficult_points: Many 泛指 many people；define A as B 表示把 A 定义为 B。
who 修饰 people；破折号后的 a department 是这种定义下的具体例子。

sentences.sentence: However, according to Edwards, it is more productive to define a team as a group of people working towards a common goal.
sentences.translation: 然而，爱德华兹认为，把团队定义为一群为共同目标而努力的人更有成效。

structure.text: to define a team as a group of people working towards a common goal

difficult_points: it 是形式主语，真正主语是 to define...。
working... 修饰 people，强调团队由共同目标而非共同上司来界定。

sentences.sentence: In training terms, therefore, this group could be members of a department with the same roles and responsibilities, such as a sales team with the common goal of selling or even the organisation as a whole, whose 'goal' in this case is the continued success of the organisation, their many different skills and roles all contributing to this in a number of ways.
sentences.translation: 因此从培训角度看，这个群体可以是职责相同的部门成员，例如以销售为共同目标的销售团队；也可以是整个组织，在后一种情况下，其“目标”是组织持续成功，而成员各不相同的技能和角色会以多种方式共同促成这一目标。

structure.text: members of a department with the same roles and responsibilities
such as a sales team with the common goal of selling or even the organisation as a whole
whose 'goal' in this case is the continued success of the organisation
their many different skills and roles all contributing to this in a number of ways

difficult_points: such as 后给出从销售团队到整个组织两个不同范围的例子。
whose 最自然地指 organisation as a whole，说明全组织共同目标。
句末是独立主格结构，their 指组织成员，this 指组织持续成功。

expressions.text: contribute to this in a number of ways
expressions.meaning_zh: 以多种方式对此作出贡献

sentences.sentence: Brenda Durham of Corporate Trouble-Shooters believes it inevitable that to some extent conflict will exist in a successful workplace since the necessary diversity of skills and personalities required for success will also unavoidably lead to misunderstandings and disharmony from time to time.
sentences.translation: Corporate Trouble-Shooters 的布伦达·达勒姆认为，成功的工作场所中不可避免会存在一定程度的冲突，因为成功所需的技能和个性多样性也必然会不时造成误解与不和。

structure.text: that to some extent conflict will exist in a successful workplace
since the necessary diversity of skills and personalities required for success will also unavoidably lead to misunderstandings and disharmony from time to time

difficult_points: believe it + 形容词 + that 中 it 是形式宾语，that 从句是真正宾语。
since 引导原因从句；required for success 修饰 diversity 或 skills and personalities。
to some extent 与 from time to time 分别限制冲突程度和发生频率。

sentences.sentence: A cohesive unit that minimises friction, she believes, can however be developed in any organisation committed to investment in its people.
sentences.translation: 但她认为，任何致力于投资员工的组织都能打造一个尽量减少摩擦的凝聚型团队。

structure.text: committed to investment in its people

difficult_points: that 修饰 a cohesive unit；she believes 是插入报道语。
can be developed 是情态动词加被动语态；however 插在谓语中表达转折。
committed to... 修饰 organisation，to 是介词，后接名词 investment。

expressions.text: be committed to investment in people

sentences.sentence: Whilst the taking on of external expertise for staff training and team building programmes can be costly, a number of companies, particularly those with a robust human resources department, are undertaking the training themselves.
sentences.translation: 尽管为员工培训和团队建设项目引入外部专业力量可能成本高昂，但不少公司，尤其是人力资源部门实力较强的公司，正自行开展培训。

structure.text: Whilst the taking on of external expertise for staff training and team building programmes can be costly
particularly those with a robust human resources department

difficult_points: Whilst 引导让步；the taking on of... 是名词化结构，表示引入外部专业人员。
those 代替 companies；particularly... 进一步限定最可能自行培训的公司。
themselves 强调培训由公司内部而非外部顾问承担。

expressions.meaning_zh: 实力较强的人力资源部门

sentences.sentence: Liaison Wizards, established in 2001 and headed by Jeff Blackshaw, offers free training and development advice to companies wishing to offer motivation seminars designed in house, in the belief that contextualised training is always more effective.
sentences.translation: Liaison Wizards 成立于2001年，由杰夫·布莱克肖领导；它向希望举办内部设计的激励研讨会的公司免费提供培训与发展建议，因为它相信结合具体情境的培训总是更有效。

structure.text: established in 2001 and headed by Jeff Blackshaw
to companies wishing to offer motivation seminars designed in house
in the belief that contextualised training is always more effective

difficult_points: established 和 headed 是并列过去分词，补充公司背景。
wishing... 修饰 companies；designed in house 修饰 motivation seminars。
that 从句同位说明 belief 的具体内容。

sentences.sentence: The company's own business model is based upon generating revenue from advertising on their popular website – a great success, so far, having surpassed financial projections for each year it has been in operation to date.
sentences.translation: 该公司的商业模式建立在通过热门网站广告创收的基础上；这一模式迄今非常成功，运营以来每年的收入都超过了财务预测。

structure.text: generating revenue from advertising on their popular website
having surpassed financial projections for each year it has been in operation to date
it has been in operation to date

difficult_points: be based upon 后接动名词 generating；from advertising 说明收入来源。
破折号后的 a great success 补充评价商业模式；having surpassed... 说明成功依据。
each year 后省略关系词 that；it 指 the company 或 business model。

sentences.sentence: Blackshaw likens the key to successful corporate team building to the tactics employed in a less formal sporting environment.
sentences.translation: 布莱克肖把企业团队建设成功的关键，比作较为非正式的体育环境中采用的策略。

structure.text: the key to successful corporate team building
to the tactics employed in a less formal sporting environment
employed in a less formal sporting environment

difficult_points: liken A to B 表示把企业团队建设与体育策略作类比。
employed... 是过去分词短语，修饰 tactics，表示体育环境中使用的策略。

expressions.text: the key to successful team building

sentences.sentence: He says that bonds, connections and empathy developed between members of a rugby team, for example, can also be developed within a department in the business world or even at company level.
sentences.translation: 他说，例如橄榄球队成员之间形成的纽带、联系和共情，也可以在企业部门内部，甚至整个公司层面培养起来。

structure.text: that bonds, connections and empathy developed between members of a rugby team, for example, can also be developed within a department in the business world or even at company level
developed between members of a rugby team

difficult_points: that 从句作 says 的宾语；第一个 developed 是过去分词，修饰三项关系。
第二个 can be developed 是谓语，说明体育团队关系可以在企业中复制。
within a department 与 at company level 表示两个不同组织层级。

sentences.sentence: He says that good team work is fostered by respect, encouragement, shared enthusiasm and a caring and supportive workplace.
sentences.translation: 他说，良好的团队合作由尊重、鼓励、共同热情以及关怀支持型工作环境培养而成。

structure.text: that good team work is fostered by respect, encouragement, shared enthusiasm and a caring and supportive workplace

difficult_points: that 从句作 says 的宾语；is fostered by 是被动语态，列出促进团队合作的因素。
shared 修饰 enthusiasm；caring 和 supportive 并列修饰 workplace。

expressions.meaning_zh: 关怀且支持员工的工作环境

sentences.sentence: Trying to exploit or dictate to personnel is sure to lead to failure, Blackshaw says.
sentences.translation: 布莱克肖说，试图利用员工或对员工发号施令，必然会导致失败。

structure.text: Trying to exploit or dictate to personnel

difficult_points: Trying... 是动名词短语作主语；exploit 与 dictate to 是并列动作。
be sure to 表示几乎必然发生；句末是报道语。

expressions.text: be sure to lead to failure

sentences.sentence: Brian Osbourne, Human Resources Director of Opmax Inc, believes that programmes developed in house are inherently more likely to be of greater success than external offerings for two main reasons.
sentences.translation: Opmax 公司人力资源总监布赖恩·奥斯本认为，内部开发的项目从根本上更可能比外部方案成功，主要有两个原因。

structure.text: Human Resources Director of Opmax Inc
that programmes developed in house are inherently more likely to be of greater success than external offerings for two main reasons

difficult_points: Human Resources Director... 是 Brian Osbourne 的同位语。
developed in house 修饰 programmes；be more likely to be... than... 比较内部项目与外部方案。
be of greater success 等于 be more successful。

sentences.sentence: Most importantly, he says, people are much easier to motivate if they themselves can be involved in designing and deciding activities – this level of consultation at the planning stage being much easier to achieve for an internal department than an external consultant.
sentences.translation: 他说，最重要的是，如果员工自己能够参与活动的设计和决定，他们就更容易受到激励——而这种规划阶段的协商程度，对内部部门而言比对外部顾问更容易实现。

structure.text: if they themselves can be involved in designing and deciding activities
this level of consultation at the planning stage being much easier to achieve for an internal department than an external consultant

difficult_points: people are easier to motivate 是“主语 + easy + 不定式”结构，语义上 people 是 motivate 的对象。
if 从句中 themselves 强调员工亲自参与；designing 和 deciding 是 in 后并列动名词。
破折号后是独立主格结构，比较内部部门和外部顾问实现协商的难度。

sentences.sentence: Of only slightly less importance, says Osbourne, training activities must be perceived by participants as providing outcomes geared towards developing the individuals'potential, Once again, programmes developed by people with an insight into the personalities and culture at hand can be more easily tailored to suit the distinctive needs of that particular audience.
sentences.translation: 奥斯本说，重要性仅略低的一点是，参与者必须认为培训活动能带来旨在开发个人潜能的成果。再次强调，由了解当前人员个性与文化的人开发的项目，更容易按特定受众的独特需求进行调整。

structure.text: by participants as providing outcomes geared towards developing the individuals'potential
programmes developed by people with an insight into the personalities and culture at hand
can be more easily tailored to suit the distinctive needs of that particular audience

difficult_points: 源文在 individuals'potential 后以逗号连接两个独立句意，并将 Once 大写；为保持原文将其作为一个单元解析。
句首 Of... importance 是前置评价，training activities 是实际主语；must be perceived as... 表示参与者必须把活动看作能产生某种成果。
developed by... 修饰 programmes；with an insight... 修饰 people；tailored to suit 表示按受众需求定制。

sentences.sentence: According to Osbourne, one of the biggest barriers to successful staff training is the perception that activities are too game-focussed, with no real objectives; many professionals, believing that such games are trite or patronising, are unable to appreciate the hidden benefits of building understanding and camaraderie within the group.
sentences.translation: 奥斯本认为，成功开展员工培训的最大障碍之一，是人们觉得活动过于游戏化、缺乏真正目标；许多专业人士认为此类游戏陈腐或带有居高临下意味，因此无法认识到在团队内部建立理解与情谊的潜在益处。

structure.text: one of the biggest barriers to successful staff training
that activities are too game-focussed, with no real objectives
believing that such games are trite or patronising
are unable to appreciate the hidden benefits of building understanding and camaraderie within the group

difficult_points: that 从句同位说明 perception 的内容；with no real objectives 补充人们的负面印象。
分号后是完整分句；believing... 是原因性分词状语，逻辑主语为 professionals。
the benefits of 后接动名词 building，understanding 与 camaraderie 是并列宾语。

expressions.text: one of the biggest barriers to

sentences.sentence: If presented correctly, within the correct context and in conjunction with other, more staid approaches, Louise Edwards holds that games can be an enormous asset in staff training.
sentences.translation: 路易丝·爱德华兹认为，如果以正确方式、在适当情境中，并结合其他更稳健严肃的方法来安排，游戏可以成为员工培训中的巨大助力。

structure.text: within the correct context and in conjunction with other, more staid approaches
that games can be an enormous asset in staff training

difficult_points: If presented... 是省略 they are 的被动条件从句，逻辑主语是 games。
within... 和 in conjunction with... 补充游戏有效的两个条件。
holds that 表示持有某种观点；an asset 指有价值的助力。

sentences.sentence: In simple terms, Edwards defines the objectives of team building activities as a process, starting with the first stage – the clarification of the collective goals.
sentences.translation: 简单来说，爱德华兹把团队建设活动的目标界定为一个过程，第一阶段从明确集体目标开始。

structure.text: the objectives of team building activities
the clarification of the collective goals

difficult_points: define A as B 表示把团队建设目标界定为一个过程。
starting... 修饰 process；破折号后的名词短语同位说明第一阶段内容。

sentences.sentence: This leads to the identification of the inhibitors preventing achievement of those goals and the introduction of enablers which will assist in goal achievement.
sentences.translation: 这会进入下一步：识别妨碍目标实现的阻碍因素，并引入有助于实现目标的促进因素。

structure.text: the identification of the inhibitors preventing achievement of those goals
and the introduction of enablers which will assist in goal achievement
which will assist in goal achievement

difficult_points: This 指明确集体目标的第一阶段；lead to 后接 identification 和 introduction 两个并列名词。
preventing... 修饰 inhibitors；which 修饰 enablers。
inhibitors 与 enablers 是相对概念，分别指阻碍因素和促进因素。

sentences.sentence: This is followed by stage four – the final stage, where outcomes are measured and from that point on are monitored to ensure that goals are achieved and continue to be achieved.
sentences.translation: 随后是第四阶段——最后阶段，在这一阶段要衡量成果，并从此持续监测，以确保目标得到实现且继续保持。

structure.text: where outcomes are measured and from that point on are monitored
to ensure that goals are achieved and continue to be achieved

difficult_points: This 指前述识别阻碍、引入促进因素的阶段；is followed by 表示下一个流程。
where 修饰 the final stage，are measured 与 are monitored 是并列被动谓语。
to ensure... 表示监测目的；are achieved 与 continue to be achieved 强调实现和持续保持。

sentences.sentence: In stages 2 and 3(identifying barriers and introducing positive alternatives) Edwards believes that the use of humour goes a long way towards relationship building on a personal level through development of empathy and removal of antipathy, ultimately fostering cooperation and support on a more formal level.
sentences.translation: 爱德华兹认为，在第二和第三阶段（识别障碍并引入积极替代方案），运用幽默可以通过培养共情、消除反感，极大促进个人层面的关系建设，并最终在更正式的层面形成合作与支持。

structure.text: In stages 2 and 3(identifying barriers and introducing positive alternatives)
that the use of humour goes a long way towards relationship building on a personal level through development of empathy and removal of antipathy
ultimately fostering cooperation and support on a more formal level

difficult_points: 源文在 `3(` 前缺少空格；括号内两个动名词说明第二、三阶段内容。
go a long way towards 表示对某事帮助很大，towards 后接 relationship building。
fostering... 是结果状语，说明个人关系改善最终带来正式合作。

sentences.sentence: Alan Kidman, HR Manager of Tellam Industries agrees that the use of humour and games within a training context can go a long way towards helping an organisation achieve its goals.
sentences.translation: Tellam Industries 人力资源经理艾伦·基德曼赞同，在培训情境中使用幽默和游戏，能极大帮助组织实现目标。

structure.text: that the use of humour and games within a training context can go a long way towards helping an organisation achieve its goals

difficult_points: HR Manager... 是 Alan Kidman 的同位语；源文在同位语后缺逗号，但句法身份清楚。
that 从句作 agrees 的宾语；helping 后接宾语 organisation 和不带 to 的 achieve。

expressions.text: help an organisation achieve its goals

sentences.sentence: He has recently designed a two month long in house team building programme for senior management and will soon be delivering the first of a series of 8 workshops and activities.
sentences.translation: 他最近为高级管理层设计了一项为期两个月的内部团队建设项目，并将很快开展一系列八场研讨会和活动中的第一场。

structure.text: a two month long in house team building programme for senior management
the first of a series of 8 workshops and activities

difficult_points: has designed 和 will be delivering 是现在完成时与将来进行时的并列谓语。
two month long 和 in house 均作复合修饰，源文未加连字符。
the first of a series of 8 表示八场活动中的第一场。

sentences.sentence: The goal of the project, he says, was to strengthen communication and support within the extremely diverse departments of the organisation.
sentences.translation: 他说，该项目的目标是加强组织内差异极大的各部门之间的沟通与支持。

structure.text: to strengthen communication and support within the extremely diverse departments of the organisation

difficult_points: he says 是插入报道语，主干是 The goal... was to strengthen...。
to strengthen... 作表语；within... 限定沟通和支持发生的组织范围。

sentences.sentence: Heads of six departments, collectively responsible for over 200 staff members, are to be involved in the series of seminars.
sentences.translation: 六个部门的负责人共同管理着200多名员工，他们将参与这一系列研讨会。

structure.text: collectively responsible for over 200 staff members

difficult_points: collectively responsible... 插入补充六位负责人共同承担的管理范围。
are to be involved 表示按计划将参与；be involved in 是固定搭配。

sentences.sentence: The programme, Kidman says, is experimental and if it proves to be a success is also intended for use in the organisation's branches overseas.
sentences.translation: 基德曼说，这项计划具有实验性质；如果证明成功，还打算把它用于该组织的海外分支机构。

structure.text: and if it proves to be a success
is also intended for use in the organisation's branches overseas

difficult_points: Kidman says 是插入语；is experimental 与 is intended 是共用主语的并列谓语。
if 从句插在第二个谓语前，it 指 programme；prove to be 表示经实践证明是。

sentences.sentence: Previously the organisation has taken a more formalised approach to staff development training relying on methods such as psychometric testing discussions, motivational conferences and formal appraisals.
sentences.translation: 此前，该组织对员工发展培训采取了更为正式化的方法，依赖心理测评讨论、激励会议和正式考核等手段。

structure.text: a more formalised approach to staff development training
relying on methods such as psychometric testing discussions, motivational conferences and formal appraisals

difficult_points: take an approach to 表示采用某种方式处理培训。
relying on... 是方式状语，逻辑主语为 organisation；such as 后列举传统培训方法。
psychometric testing discussions 源文无逗号，可能指心理测评及讨论或心理测评讨论。

sentences.sentence: The new, and as yet untried, approach will challenge participants in, by comparison, rather radical ways.
sentences.translation: 相比之下，这种尚未尝试的新方法将以相当激进的方式挑战参与者。

structure.text: The new, and as yet untried, approach
in, by comparison, rather radical ways

difficult_points: and as yet untried 插入修饰 approach，as yet 表示截至目前仍未。
by comparison 是介词短语内部的插入语，说明这种方式相对于以往更激进。

sentences.sentence: One initiative, for example, requiring the writing, organisation and delivery of a theatrical performance to which all staff members will be invited to view.
sentences.translation: 例如，其中一项举措要求参与者编写、组织并呈现一场戏剧表演，所有员工都将受邀观看。

structure.text: requiring the writing, organisation and delivery of a theatrical performance
to which all staff members will be invited to view

difficult_points: 源文是缺少限定谓语的句子片段，可理解为 One initiative requires...。
requiring... 修饰 One initiative，writing、organisation 和 delivery 是并列名词。
to which 与 view 的搭配存在源文语法异常；按语义理解为所有员工将被邀请观看这场表演。

expressions.text: the delivery of a theatrical performance

sentences.sentence: Team building and motivational approaches include a wide variety of methodologies, techniques, theories and tools.
sentences.translation: 团队建设与激励方法涵盖多种多样的方法论、技巧、理论和工具。

structure.text: a wide variety of methodologies, techniques, theories and tools

difficult_points: Team building 与 motivational 共同修饰 approaches。
a wide variety of 后列举四类并列内容，强调没有单一固定方法。

sentences.sentence: Experts generally agree that different options may succeed or fail depending upon the culture of the organisation in which they are implemented.
sentences.translation: 专家普遍认为，不同方案能否成功取决于实施这些方案的组织文化。

structure.text: that different options may succeed or fail depending upon the culture of the organisation in which they are implemented
depending upon the culture of the organisation

difficult_points: that 从句作 agree 的宾语；may succeed or fail 表示两种可能结果。
depending upon... 说明成败条件；in which 修饰 organisation，they 指 different options。

sentences.sentence: A fit with the personalities involved in crucial to success.
sentences.translation: 与相关人员的个性相契合，对成功至关重要。

structure.text: A fit with the personalities involved

difficult_points: 源文 `in crucial to success` 存在明显 OCR 或录入错误，正常句法应为 is crucial to success；为保持原文未改写。
A fit with... 指培训方案与参与者个性之间的匹配；involved 修饰 personalities。

sentences.sentence: Not only is delivery of appropriate training sessions themselves important but professional and measurable follow up is also a must.
sentences.translation: 不仅恰当培训课程本身的实施很重要，专业且可衡量的后续跟进也必不可少。

structure.text: Not only is delivery of appropriate training sessions themselves important
but professional and measurable follow up is also a must

difficult_points: Not only 位于句首触发部分倒装，正常语序为 delivery... is important。
but 后完整分句与前半构成 not only... but also... 关联结构。
themselves 的位置较异常，语义上强调 training sessions 本身；a must 表示必不可少的事项。

expressions.meaning_zh: 专业且可衡量的后续跟进
